decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

Runner false-negative (gating bug L137: absolute thresholds skipped when prior snapshot lacked a reading, and 06-13 snapshot was the sparse/broken one). Manual review of full 06-27 coverage: v3_long_Tunguska (FacPhS3hNjU) long-form = 110v — CROSSES >100v long-form threshold AND contradicts the 06-13 'long-form 0v under suppression' thesis. v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q) short = 319v — new all-time best Short (>v2_twist 298), still marked SCHEDULED in state (auto-published 06-15, drift). Shorts plateau holds: v1_twist 274→281, v2_twist 298→299, v3_answer 106→112, v2_hook 4→7 (narrative hook still dead).

Studio deep-dive on FacPhS3hNjU traffic sources skipped: stealth default session is alive + parked on the exact analytics page, but auth_check returns auth_valid=false / status=dead ('Re-login required'). Google/Studio cookies expired. Logged and exited cleanly per hard rule; no dead-session push attempted. Monitor view-count fetch is public (viewCount regex) and unaffected.
